EMERGENCY MANAGEMENT FROM RANDOLPH COUNTY REPORTED A WORK SHOP, 2 TRAVEL TRAILERS WERE DESTROYED AT ROAD AA JUST SOUTHWEST OF RENICK. A COUNTY WORK TRUCK WAS ALSO OVERTURNED AT THIS LOCATION.

*** 1 INJ *** REPORT FROM MISSOURI HIGHWAY PATROL TROOP B IS THAT THERE ARE SEVERAL STRUCTURES BETWEEN HIGBEE AND RENICK DAMAGED OR DESTROYED BY STRONG WINDS. ALONG ROAD 2550 BETWEEN HIGBEE AND RENICK LEAST ONE OF THESE BUILDINGS WAS A DOUBLE-WIDE MOBILE HOME, WHICH WAS COMPLETELY DESTROYED. AT LEAST ONE INJURY OCCURRED AT THIS LOCATION. NEARBY, A SECOND DESTROYED STRUCTURE WAS A MODULAR HOME. SEVERAL POWER LINES HAVE BEEN REPORTED DOWN ALONG THE PATH.
LARGE TREE BRANCHES WERE SNAPPED OFF ON MULTIPLE TREES. TREES APPEAR HEALTHY.
A BARN AND GARAGE HAVE SIGNIFICANT DAMAGE.
